examples: Easy and pleasant as their life at Paris was, it was after all only an idle dalliance and amiable trifling.
No, Mr Terry's real offence was, I am sure, to try to prevent his alleged dalliance being reported by the tabloids.
My mother had to go out of her way to the Dial-a-Style, which probably meant that she suspected my father's dalliance.
Genzyme, in the midst of a takeover dalliance with Sanofi-Aventis was another popular name.
The news business has no problem giving saturation coverage to such salacious stories as David Petraeus' dalliance with Paula Broadwell.
